overview: Functional Medicine Partners provides personalized medical wellness care including weight loss with GLP-1 medications, bioidentical hormone replacement, peptide therapy, men's health services, and functional medicine. Care is delivered through in-person visits in Syracuse and statewide telehealth across Indiana.
highlights: Personalized GLP-1 weight loss programs with nutrition coaching
targetAudience: Adults seeking personalized medical wellness care for weight loss, hormone imbalance, men's health, and functional medicine approaches to chronic symptoms.
